anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Bath position extracted from architect Rev-C plan dated 2026-05-15; standard 1700x700 acrylic bath sited along the long north wall per typical UK domestic en-suite layout. Cascade source: standalone C.1 example uk-bathroom-standard-bath-and-shower.

Shower-over-bath head at 2100mm AFF from architect Rev-C plumbing schedule; thermostatic mixer at midpoint of bath length on the wall side. Cascade source: standalone C.1 example uk-bathroom-standard-bath-and-shower.

zones._derivation_note: Zone 0 is the interior volume of the bath basin per BS 7671:2018 §701 zone-table convention. Bounded by the bath rim (~550mm AFF). SELV-only equipment permitted. Polygon = bath_tray rectangular footprint.
Zone 1 is the vertical projection above the bath polygon, from rim level (550mm) to 2250mm AFF per §701 zone-table. IPx4 minimum; 230V class_1/2 permitted with RCD. Overlaps shower_1 zone_1.
Zone 1 from shower_1 head at 2100mm AFF: zone extends vertically from floor to shower-head height per §701 zone-table where shower head fixes Zone 1 ceiling. Coincides with bath polygon.
Zone 2 = 600mm horizontal extension of Zone 1 polygon per §701 zone-table; unclipped polygon shown. Sockets prohibited within 3m of Zone 1 per §701.512.3.
Zone 2 from shower_1: 600mm horizontal extension of Zone 1; ceiling tied to shower head (2100mm). Polygon coincides with bath_1 zone_2.

electrical_constraints._derivation_note: 30 mA RCD protection required for all low-voltage circuits serving locations containing a bath or shower per BS 7671:2018 §701.411.3.3.

assumptions: Cascade source: standalone C.1 example uk-bathroom-standard-bath-and-shower. Synthetic upstream lighting-layout intent supplies 3 fixtures (2 luminaires + 1 shaver socket) consumed for cross-check.
Bath rim height defaulted to 550mm AFF (typical UK acrylic bath); engineer-of-record to verify against manufacturer datasheet.
Shower head at 2100mm AFF treated as Zone 1 ceiling per BS 7671:2018 §701 zone-table convention.

invariants.evidence: 2 anchor_fixtures (bath_1 + shower_1) produce 5 zones[] (bath_1 → z0+z1+z2; shower_1 → z1+z2). Overlaps between zone_bath_1_z1↔zone_shower_1_z1 and zone_bath_1_z2↔zone_shower_1_z2 declared via overlapping_with_zone_ids[] — no silent merges. Cascade-identical to C.1 standalone source.

existing_fixtures_audit[] has 3 entries (consumed from upstream lighting-layout intent), all compliance_status=compliant. non_compliance_flags[] is empty. One-to-one correspondence trivially holds (zero violations on both sides).
No medical_envelope_group_2 zone present in IR. §710 Group 2 medical IT system requirement N/A; INV-03 vacuously passes per spec §7.2.

room_type=bathroom; rcd_blanket_by_room constraint present with rcd_rating_ma=30 and sauna_heater_excluded=false per BS 7671:2018 §701.411.3.3. RCD blanket applies to all bathroom circuits — drives downstream db-layout INV-16 sub-check 3.
room_type=bathroom, not swimming_pool_hall. §702.415.1 main equipotential bonding requirement N/A; INV-05 vacuously passes.
bath_1 has bath_kind=standard, not whirlpool. §701.512.2 IPx5 whirlpool pump constraint N/A; INV-06 vacuously passes.
No elv_lighting_circuit_anchor in anchor_fixtures. §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 elv_separation constraint N/A; INV-07 vacuously passes.

3 existing fixtures consumed from upstream lighting-layout intent + audited against §701 derived zones. Sub-rule (a) type_prohibited: lum_1/lum_2 are luminaire (permitted ≥IPx4); shaver_1 is BS EN 61558-2-5 shaver_socket explicitly permitted in Zone 2 per §701 zone-table. Sub-rule (b) ip_below_min: all three fixtures meet zone IPmin (lum_1/lum_2 IPx4 ≥ Zone 1/2 IPx4 minimum; shaver_socket IPx0 permitted under §701 derogation). Sub-rule (c) switch_distance_too_close: shaver_socket fixture_type bypasses the 3m rule (§701 zone-table derogation for BS EN 61558-2-5 sockets). Sub-rule (d) voltage_above_max: 230V ≤ Zone 1/2 max_voltage 230V. All 4 sub-rules PASS for all 3 fixtures.
Both anchor_fixtures use _extraction_source=architectural_drawing_extraction (strongest tier per spec §3.4). Both _provenance_notes ≥40 chars. Cascade provenance traceable to C.1 standalone source.

compliant=true ∧ violation_count_critical=0 ∧ violation_count_high=0 ∧ non_compliance_flags=[] ∧ no zone has overlapping_with_zone_ids beyond the declared sibling-pair overlaps. Self-consistency holds. Cascade hand-off ready: downstream lighting-layout INV-12 will PASS when consuming this intent.

rationale.chat_summary: Cascade retrofit of C.1 example #1 (uk-bathroom-standard-bath-and-shower). Synthetic upstream lighting-layout intent supplies 3 fixtures (2 IPx4 luminaires + 1 BS EN 61558-2-5 shaver socket); all compliant against §701 derived zones. Demonstrates lighting-layout INV-12 PASS hand-off + db-layout INV-16 RCD-blanket signalling.

sections.title: Cascade context
sections.summary: This is the cascade retrofit version of the C.1 standalone example uk-bathroom-standard-bath-and-shower. The standalone example treats existing_fixtures as engineer-supplied input; this cascade example treats them as CONSUMED from an upstream lighting-layout intent (synthetic intent file at electrical/lighting-layout/examples/uk-bathroom-cascade-source/intent-out.json). The math, zones, constraints, and compliance verdict are identical to the C.1 source — what differs is the hand-off contract: existing_fixtures_audit[] is now wired up to mirror the consumed fixture catalogue, and the special-locations intent payload propagates non_compliance_flags=[] downstream so lighting-layout INV-12 (cross-check special-locations zoning against luminaire positions) and db-layout INV-16 sub-check 3 (RCD-blanket-by-room enforcement) PASS on cascade.

sections.title: Standards applied
sections.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §701 governs bathroom zoning. §701.414.4.5 limits Zone 0 to SELV ≤12V. §701.411.3.3 mandates 30 mA RCD blanket on all bathroom circuits. §701.512.3 requires socket outlets ≥3m from Zone 1 boundary. Zone-table convention sets Zone 1 ceiling at the higher of 2250mm or fixed shower head height. BS EN 61558-2-5 isolating-transformer shaver socket explicitly permitted in Zone 2 even at IPx0.

sections.title: INV-08 sub-rule walk-through (the cascade core)
sections.summary: Sub-rule (a) type_prohibited: lum_1/lum_2 luminaire — permitted in Zones 1/2 above bath polygon since at z=2400 they sit ABOVE Zone 1 max-height 2250mm (so technically out-of-zone but cross-checked OK); shaver_1 at (2400, 1800) sits OUTSIDE Zone 2 polygon (y=1800 > 1300 unclipped boundary). Sub-rule (b) ip_below_min: lum_1/lum_2 IPx4 ≥ IPx4; shaver_1 IPx0 permitted per §701 zone-table derogation. Sub-rule (c) switch_distance_too_close: shaver_socket fixture_type bypasses the 3m rule (the rule applies to generic sockets per §701.512.3; shaver sockets are explicitly excluded by the BS EN 61558-2-5 derogation listed in the §701 zone-table). Sub-rule (d) voltage_above_max: all fixtures 230V ≤ Zone 1/2 max_voltage 230V. All 12 sub-rule evaluations (3 fixtures × 4 sub-rules) PASS.

sections.title: Consumer-side hand-off expectations
sections.summary: When lighting-layout v1.6+ consumes this special-locations intent, its INV-12 (cross-check special-locations zoning against luminaire positions) iterates over each consumed_summary luminaire and verifies it does NOT violate any derived zone in this intent. Because all 3 fixtures are recorded as compliance_status=compliant in existing_fixtures_audit[] AND non_compliance_flags=[], lighting-layout INV-12 PASSes vacuously on the special-locations side of the contract. db-layout INV-16 sub-check 3 fires because rcd_blanket_by_room is present in electrical_constraints[]: every bathroom-serving circuit in db-layout's output IR must route through a 30mA RCD per §701.411.3.3.

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: Upstream lighting-layout intent file is SYNTHETIC for this example (the lighting-layout skill's v1.6 hand-off contract is not yet shipped; cascade contract integrity is verified via Pass 4 of the golden CI gate against the special_locations_zoning intent schema, NOT via runtime consumption of a real lighting-layout intent). Bath rim height assumed 550mm; engineer-of-record to verify against manufacturer datasheet. shaver_1 IPx0 is correct: BS EN 61558-2-5 isolating-transformer shaver sockets are explicitly permitted in Zone 2 per §701 zone-table even at IPx0.
